flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Wes Watkins Technology Center fell 63% between 2021 and 2024 (10.0% → 3.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Wes Watkins Technology Center fell 43% between 2006 and 2009 (343 → 194).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Wes Watkins Technology Center fell 36% between 2006 and 2009 (88.9% → 57.1%).
